sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.comment: Flow Activation when change in the 'Operational state' detected via scheduled script
sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.name: Updated

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Check if they are any Incidents created for the targeted device
If the Incident already created notify by a new diagnostic record

sys_hub_sub_flow_instance_v2.comment: Initiate the Incident Flow if the new record needs to be created

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: Check of the Incident count number
